footer.tagline: Own land. Live well. Start in Romania.
footer.bottom: Curated rural homes. Verified paperwork. Full buying support.
hero.eyebrow: PRIVATE RURAL PROPERTY GUIDANCE IN ROMANIA
hero.headline: A quieter, healthier life in Europe still exists.
hero.supportingHeadline: We help you buy it safely in rural Romania.
hero.subheadline: Romanian Heritage Estates helps international families buy verified rural and heritage properties in Romania - with full guidance from first call to notary, keys and life after purchase.
hero.trustLine: Curated rural homes. Verified paperwork. Full buying support.
hero.smallLine: For families, remote workers and buyers who want land, peace and a slower life - without facing the Romanian buying process alone.
home.pain.title:
Maybe life in the city still works.
But does it still feel right?
home.pain.line6: Your children spend more time indoors.
home.pain.line7: And every year, real freedom feels further away.
home.pain.question1: What would life look like with more land?
home.pain.close: In rural Romania, that life still exists.
home.dream.title: A slower life. A stronger family. A home with land.
home.dream.line1: Wake up to hills, forests or mountains.
home.dream.line2: Drink coffee in your own garden.
home.dream.line3: Grow food your children can pick with their hands.
home.dream.line4: Keep animals, build a garden, plant an orchard or restore an old home with soul - when the property and local rules allow it.
home.dream.line5: Work online from a quiet house.
home.dream.line6: Then step outside into real nature.
home.dream.quote:
This is not about escaping life.

It is about choosing a better one.
home.why.title: Because Europe still has places that feel alive.
home.why.intro:
Romania is not for everyone.

But for the right buyer, it can offer something rare: land, beauty, privacy, strong internet, old villages, mountain air and a way of life that still feels close to nature.
home.why.card1.title: Land still means something
home.why.card1.body: In many rural areas, homes still come with gardens, orchards, barns, fields or forest edges. Space is not a luxury fantasy. It is real.
home.why.card2.title: Old-world beauty. Modern connection.
home.why.card2.body: Romania is known for strong fixed broadband speeds, which can make many areas attractive for remote work and digital entrepreneurs.
home.why.card3.title: Nature you can feel every day
home.why.card3.body: The Carpathians, forests, rivers, mineral springs, submontane villages and open countryside create a life that feels calmer, healthier and more grounded.
home.why.card4.title: An undervalued rural market
home.why.card4.body: Compared to many Western European countryside regions, Romania still offers rare homes, larger plots and long-term upside.
home.why.card5.title: A life closer to the land
home.why.card5.body: Gardens, animals, orchards, firewood, wells, barns and seasonal food are still part of everyday life in many Romanian villages.
home.why.card6.title: A guided path, not a blind leap
home.why.card6.body: You do not need to understand Romania alone. We guide the search, paperwork, travel, legal steps and post-purchase transition.
home.properties.title:
Curated rural properties.
Not endless listings.
home.properties.body:
We do not list every house we find.

We select properties with real lifestyle potential, strong character and verified paperwork.

Some are ready to enjoy.
Some need restoration.
Some are quiet family homes.
Some could become retreats, farms or private escapes.

Every property must have a reason to be here.
home.services.title: From first call to keys in hand - we stay with you.
home.services.body:
Buying in another country can feel risky.

Different language.
Different rules.
Unknown people.
Unknown paperwork.

That is why our role is simple:

We make the process feel clear, safe and guided.
home.services.item1.body: We learn what kind of life you want, not just what kind of house you want.
home.services.item2.body: We show you selected homes that match your lifestyle, budget, timeline and non-negotiables.
home.services.item3.body: Before you see a property, we check documents, ownership status and cadastral records - so you do not fall in love with a home you cannot safely buy.
home.services.item4.body: Our trusted legal and notary partners help you understand the process before you sign.
home.services.item5.body: We can help with airport pickup, accommodation and private property tours.
home.services.item6.body: After the keys are yours, we can help with utilities, local contacts, renovation partners and practical setup.
home.process.title: Buying in Romania should not feel like walking into the unknown.
home.process.intro:
You do not need to call random agents.
You do not need to translate legal papers alone.
You do not need to guess which village is right for your family.

We built a private process for international buyers who want clarity before they move.
home.process.step1.title: Private Consultation
home.process.step1.body: We learn what kind of life you want, your budget, your timeline and your non-negotiables.
home.process.step2.title: Curated Shortlist
home.process.step2.body: We show you selected properties that match your lifestyle, not random listings.
home.process.step3.title: Romania Visit
home.process.step3.body: We help with airport pickup, accommodation and private property tours.
home.process.step4.title: Legal & Notary Process
home.process.step4.body: Our trusted legal and notary partners help verify the property and move the process forward.
home.process.step5.title: Keys & Aftercare
home.process.step5.body: After purchase, we help you settle in, connect with local services and understand what comes next.
home.trust.title:
Built on old relationships.
Reimagined for international buyers.
home.trust.p1: Romanian Heritage Estates is a new agency, but it is not built from zero.
home.trust.p2: Our family worked in Romanian real estate from 1998 to 2010, closing transactions, working with property owners and building long-standing relationships with notaries, legal professionals and local market insiders.
home.trust.p3: Today, we bring that local knowledge into a new kind of agency: one created for international families who want rural Romania, but do not want to face the process alone.
home.trust.bullet1: Family real estate background since the late 1990s
home.trust.bullet3: Verified cadastral and ownership documents before listing
home.trust.bullet6: Guidance before, during and after purchase
home.faq.title: You may be wondering...
home.faq.a1: Many international buyers are surprised by how peaceful Romanian rural life can feel. As with any country, safety depends on the region, village and property. We help you understand the area before you decide.
home.faq.q2: Can foreigners buy property in Romania?
home.faq.a2: In many cases, yes. The process depends on citizenship, property type and land structure. We guide buyers through the right legal path with trusted specialists.
home.faq.q3: Can I work remotely from rural Romania?
home.faq.a3: Romania is known for strong internet infrastructure, and many areas offer excellent fixed broadband. We check connectivity as part of the property review.
home.faq.q4: Will I see the exact property location online?
home.faq.a4: No. To protect owners and buyers, we show only the general area. Exact details are shared during the qualified buyer process.
home.faq.q5: Do you help after the purchase?
home.faq.a5: Yes. We can help with utilities, local contacts, renovation partners, translation, practical setup and settling in.
home.faq.q6: Do you only sell move-in ready homes?
home.faq.a6: No. Some homes are move-in ready. Others need restoration. We focus on properties with real lifestyle potential, character and clean documentation.
home.faq.a7: Not at this stage. Most properties are listed as Price on request. Details are shared during the private buyer process.
home.guide.title: Before you book a flight to Romania, read this first.
home.guide.body:
Buying rural property here can be one of the best moves you make.

But only if you know what to check.

Get the private guide we created for international buyers who want land, peace and a safe buying process in Romania.
home.guide.cta: Book a Private Consultation & Get the Guide
home.guide.name: The International Buyer's Guide to Rural Property in Romania
home.guide.item2: What to check before you visit
home.guide.item7: How to plan your first Romania visit
home.final.title: Your rural life in Romania does not have to start with confusion.
home.final.body:
Tell us what kind of life you want.

We will help you understand if Romania is the right place to build it.
